docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLEMAN, MAURICE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00 SERVED FEB-20-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIJOUX, LUXE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAURICE COLEMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUXE BIJOUX IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLEMAN, MAURICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIJOUX, LUXE $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY COLEMAN, MAURICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIJOUX, LUXE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 03/31/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NO SUCH NUMBER UNABLE TO FORWARD)
